message:
chore: update audit index and sync beads issue tracker

audit_index.jsonl:
- Record BronzeGlacier DNS shutdown audit (SOUND) and kafka blocking
  pool regression audit (SOUND with focused test coverage).
- Record GeminiCLI audits: quic/mod, quic_native/transport,
  websocket/handshake, scenario_runner, forensic_log, network/network,
  virtual_time_wheel, deadline_monotone oracle, messaging/stream,
  graded obligations, unix/ancillary, quiescence oracle, loser_drain
  oracle, rref_access oracle, dns/error, net/mod (all SOUND).

.beads/issues.jsonl:
- Sync beads state with completed and in-progress work items from
  concurrent agent sessions.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
